invalidDesc: This link no longer exists. Ask your therapist for a new link.
answeredOf: {answered} of {total, plural, one {# question answered} other {# questions answered}}
notesPlaceholder: Anything you'd like to share with the therapist...
doneDesc: Your answers were submitted successfully and are now in your clinical record.
answerAll: {count, plural, one {# question left to answer.} other {# questions left to answer.}}

docUpload.title: Document upload
docUpload.subtitle: Send lab results, photos and notes straight to your patient record.
docUpload.foundDesc: We found your record by the email <hl>{email}</hl>. Click continue to send your files.
docUpload.notFound: Email not found. Complete your registration to continue.
docUpload.securityNote: Your information is sent securely and is only visible to the clinic team.
docUpload.dropHint: Photos, PDFs · up to 15 MB per file
docUpload.notesPlaceholder: Describe your symptoms, recent history, questions or anything else you'd like to share with your clinic...
docUpload.filesFooter: Your files go straight to your clinic record, secure and encrypted.
docUpload.doneHint: The clinic team can now see your documents and notes in your record.

capture.publicIntro: Fill in your details and answer the questionnaire. It only takes a few minutes.
capture.consent: I authorize the clinic to process my personal and health data for contact and care purposes.
capture.privacyNote: Your data is protected and used only for your care.
capture.publicDoneDesc: Thank you. The clinic team will review them and get in touch with you soon.
